name: Syrah Resources Limited
analysis: SYR's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 77% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (0.8× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$0.1200, stop A$0.0990, target A$0.1350 (0.71:1) — then trail it.
